expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the output explicitly states the benchmark focus and enumerates the three required distinctions: “Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes: - Supported formats - Entry points - Output expectations”. It also reiterates inability to verify plan artifacts but the case focus itself is explicitly covered in the narrative.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is framed as “Phase5b Checkpoint Enforcement” and lists Phase 5b required artifacts (“context/checkpoint_audit…”, “context/checkpoint_delta…”, “drafts/qa_plan_phase5b…”). It repeatedly centers Phase 5b alignment (e.g., “What Phase 5b requires”, “Evidence-based assessment (blind_pre_defect)”, “Benchmark verdict”, and “Primary checkpoint/phase targeted: Phase 5b”).
